steps.title: Set up the conversion factor
steps.content: We know that 1 yard equals 3 feet, so the conversion factor is $$\frac{3 \text{ feet}}{1 \text{ yard}}$$ Multiplying the given yards by this factor cancels yards and leaves feet: $$37 \text{ yards} \times \frac{3 \text{ feet}}{1 \text{ yard}} = 37 \times 3 \text{ feet}$$
